name: Chorus Pro (FR) e-Invoicing
description: France Chorus Pro / Factur-X (UN/CEFACT CII, same syntax as ZUGFeRD) e-invoicing adapter, contributed into invoice:adapter — sandboxed. Generates real EN 16931 CII (Factur-X EXTENDED profile), signs host-side (XAdES), and transmits to a tenant-configured Chorus Pro gateway.

settings.label: Chorus Pro Gateway URL
settings.help: HTTP endpoint that accepts the Factur-X CII XML (Chorus Pro API). Required to transmit; leave empty to only generate the document (status 'noop').

secrets.label: Chorus Pro Bearer Token
secrets.help: Optional bearer token for the Chorus Pro API; injected host-side, never seen by the plugin.
